context.description: The bookmarks route exposed multiple frontend clarity issues: the header nav still showed Open archive as active, bookmark previews could surface raw HTML tags, and version labels were not presented consistently as numeric versions.

problem.summary: The bookmarks and version interfaces provide misleading visual feedback and noisy content rendering.

details.issue: Header primary navigation used a hard-coded active style for Open archive instead of the current route.
Bookmark excerpts could render raw HTML markup as text noise.
Version history lacked explicit numeric version labels.

requirements.requirement: Highlight the current primary route instead of hard-coding Open archive
Keep inactive links visually quieter than the active route
Strip raw HTML tags from bookmark excerpts
Apply the same version-number convention in version history surfaces

acceptance_criteria.criteria: /bookmarks highlights Bookmarks instead of Open archive
Bookmark previews show readable text instead of raw HTML markup
Version history uses numeric labels such as Version 1, Version 2, Version 3
